channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: shiyu-coder /Kronos | Python | N/A
item.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

item.title: NVIDIA /SkillSpector | Python | N/A
item.description: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

item.title: itsfatduck /optimizerDuck | C# | N/A
item.description: Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

item.title: mikeroyal /Self-Hosting-Guide | Dockerfile | N/A
item.description: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

item.title: Raphire /Win11Debloat | PowerShell | N/A
item.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

item.title: Free-TV /IPTV | Python | N/A
item.description: M3U Playlist for free TV channels

item.title: music-assistant /server | Python | N/A
item.description: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

item.title: rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch | Python | N/A
item.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: jwasham /coding-interview-university | N/A | N/A
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: trycua /cua | HTML | N/A
item.description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).

item.title: freeCodeCamp /freeCodeCamp | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

item.title: krahets /hello-algo | Java | N/A
item.description: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

item.title: chatwoot /chatwoot | Ruby | N/A
item.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

item.title: Panniantong /Agent-Reach | Python | N/A
item.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

item.title: teslamate-org /teslamate | Elixir | N/A
item.description: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘 [main maintainer=@JakobLichterfeld]

item.title: iptv-org /iptv | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
